response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience and genuine strength in high-throughput distributed systems, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core domain of this Principal-level Growth/Experimentation role. There is no evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry/instrumentation infrastructure, or growth measurement work anywhere in the career history. The seniority level is also a gap — historical and current titles are Senior/Staff, while the role requires Principal/IC6 with demonstrated cross-organizational technical leadership at scale, which is not evidenced in the resume.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems demonstrates genuine technical breadth
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency async I/O) shows production-scale credibility
Consistent software craftsmanship practices — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community contribution through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: No evidence of experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or growth engineering anywhere in the resume — the entire core domain of this role is absent
No telemetry, instrumentation, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis background visible in any role
Seniority gap: the role targets Principal/IC6 with cross-team architectural influence at enterprise scale; the candidate's demonstrated scope has been primarily team- or project-level

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth domain experience
No telemetry or metrics platform background
